## Machine Learning 101

::: {.idx-lead}
A hands-on introduction to machine learning — 4 lectures plus reference
material. Sample course for the CleanSlideKit theme.
:::

<div id="lecture-search">
  <input id="search-input" type="search" placeholder="Full-text search — find which lecture covered it (e.g. gradient, overfitting)" autocomplete="off">
  <div id="search-results" class="search-ui-results"></div>
</div>

:::: {.lectures}

### Foundations {.sec .cat1}
::: {.grid .cat1}
- [Getting started](getting-started.qmd)
- [Gradient descent](gradient-descent.qmd)
:::

### Models {.sec .cat2}
::: {.grid .cat2}
- [Linear regression](linear-regression.qmd)
- [Neural networks](neural-networks.qmd)
:::

### Reference {.sec}
::: {.grid .app}
- [Cheat sheet](cheat-sheet.qmd)
:::

::::
